3293230.name: Super Harvest
3293230.description:
Super Harvest – Your Cozy, Endless Farming Adventure

Step into a world of warmth and growth. In Super Harvest, you’ll plant and harvest crops, care for animals, and expand your homestead into the farm you’ve always imagined. With seasons to enjoy and land to shape, every day brings something new.

Features:

  • 🌽 Grow & Harvest – Sow seeds, nurture your crops, and bring in big harvests.

  • 🐄 Care for Animals – Chickens, cows, and more make your farm feel alive.

  • 🏡 Build Your Farm – Expand, design, and customize your land your way.

  • 🍂 Seasons & Surprises – Enjoy cozy cycles of planting and discovery.

  • ♾ Endless Replayability – Every farm is different, every return feels fresh.

Whether you want to relax at your own pace or chase big harvests, Farm Forever is a timeless experience you’ll always come back to.
3293230.supported_languages:
英语*, 土耳其语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
